topic: Preserving Orang Laut and Orang Pulau memory
core_issue: Many younger Singaporeans are unfamiliar with the histories, rituals, foodways, and maritime knowledge of island communities connected to Pulau Brani and the southern islands.
intended_audience: Gen Z students and educators in Singapore
goal: Encourage greater participation in heritage stewardship and intergenerational storytelling.
constraints: Do not flatten Orang Laut and Orang Pulau communities into one story.
